# Shattered Pixel Dungeon item atlas

`items.png` is an unchanged copy of:

`core/src/main/assets/sprites/items.png`

from Shattered Pixel Dungeon v3.3.8, commit `7b8b845a76fe76c6b7c031ae9e570852411f56db`.

The asset is used by Seed Seeker, an independent, unofficial project. Seed Seeker is not affiliated with or endorsed by Shattered Pixel Dungeon or its authors. The surrounding Android UI is original and does not reuse game UI components.
